---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this repository configuration
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 What problem does this enhancement solve?

A clear description of what feature or optimization is missing in the current repository layout (e.g., new global middlewares,
plugins, logging tweaks).

## 💡 Describe the Proposed Solution

Provide a detailed breakdown of your idea. If this strictly touches a specific runtime architecture (Rootless, TCP, Podman
updates), please specify.

## 🛠 Implementation Example (if applicable)

If you have a rough configuration mockup (e.g., updates for `http.yml` or `traefik.yml`), paste it here:

```yaml
# Your config snippet / labels mockup
```

## ➕ Additional Context

Add any other context, links to official Traefik document resources, or real-world examples about the feature request here.
